full_text:
Mao Zong 毛宗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mao Zong (毛宗). Was sent by Cao Pi to give back the seal and ribbon Cao Pi received to appear disinterested in the Han throne. Mao Zong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
